subcodes.first_line: O pilgrim of the sacred Sepulchre! Praise be to God, thou hast adorned the temple of existence with the raiment of supreme bounty and crowned it with a diadem of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زائر تربت پاک الحمد لله هیکل وجود را بخلعت موهبت کبری آراستی و تاجی از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
